allow: PowerShell($cmds = @\("node","npm","npx","python","py","php"\); foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($p\){ "$c -> $\($p.Source\)" } else { "$c -> \(not found\)" } })
Bash(awk '/Peter Pan.s Flight/{f=1} f{print} /status/{if\(f\)c++} c>1{exit}' /tmp/live.json | head -30)
